name: Nova Robotics
summary: Warehouse robotics startup building modular pick-and-pack systems for mid-market logistics operators.
notes: Strong commercial traction. Worth comparing against labor-shortage trends in fulfillment and retail logistics.

name: Lattice Bio
summary: Precision therapeutics company developing AI-assisted protein design workflows for inflammatory disease targets.
notes: Early-stage but technically interesting. Might matter if your boss wants defensible science-heavy deals.

name: SunGrid Energy
summary: Distributed energy platform helping commercial buildings optimize battery usage and grid participation.
notes: Could be a repeat watchlist company if the daily reports keep surfacing climate infrastructure plays.

name: Copper Health
summary: Remote care platform focused on post-surgery recovery tracking and patient engagement.
notes: Smaller round, but maybe relevant if he wants fast-growing operators before they become crowded.
